ec2.elb.accessloggingpolicy.EmitInterval.Docs: The interval for publishing the access logs. You can specify an interval of either 5 minutes or 60 minutes.  Default: 60 minutes

ec2.elb.accessloggingpolicy.Enabled.Docs: Specifies whether access logs are enabled for the load balancer.

ec2.elb.accessloggingpolicy.S3BucketName.Docs: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket where the access logs are stored.

ec2.elb.accessloggingpolicy.S3BucketPref.Docs: The logical hierarchy you created for your Amazon S3 bucket, for example `my-bucket-prefix/prod`. If the prefix is not provided, the log is placed at the root level of the bucket.
